projects.title: Little Lemon - Restaurant Management App
projects.description: A fully functional restaurant app developed as part of Meta's Android certification program. It features user authentication with Firebase, dynamic menu rendering via Firestore, and an admin panel for managing dishes and orders — all built with a polished Jetpack Compose UI.

projects.title: Wizardi – Multi-Utility Discord Bot
projects.description: A versatile and customizable Discord bot built with Python. Wizardi features modular command handling, rich embeds, moderation tools, and integrations for server utility and fun, all designed with scalability in mind.

projects.title: track-At. - College Companion
projects.description: A modern Android attendance-tracking app built with Jetpack Compose, designed to help students and professionals stay on top of their schedules. Features a smart weekly scheduler, quick present/absent/cancelled marking, real-time attendance-percentage insights, and semester-based subject management — all backed by a local Room database with import-export support for easy backups.

projects.title: GearBox – Android Toolkit
projects.description: A Kotlin and Jetpack Compose rewrite of an Android toolkit app, bundling 28 handy mini-tools — calculators, converters, games/randomizers, and utilities — into one Material 3 app. Built on a single-activity, Navigation Compose architecture with a flexible tool-registry system, SharedPreferences-backed persistence for tools that need it, and a searchable, favoritable home screen.
